insight.title: Why could you operate despite not reading the text?
insight.subtitle: Universal patterns in chat UI guide your actions
insight.inputTitle: Input field is a universal UI
insight.inputDesc: The text input box + send button combination is adopted in chat apps worldwide including WhatsApp, LINE, and Slack. Once experienced, you can intuitively operate it regardless of language.
insight.sendDesc: Right-pointing arrow and paper plane icons have become established across cultures as symbols meaning send or proceed.
insight.bubbleDesc: Right is me, Left is other. This bubble layout is the de facto standard of chat UI.

insight.title: How did you know the stamp button?
insight.subtitle: Emoji and stamps are the common language of emotions
insight.emojiDesc: Emoji convey emotions directly without relying on language.
insight.iconDesc: Smiley face icons intuitively indicate press here for stamps.
insight.colorDesc: The green color is deeply associated with messaging apps.

quiz3.missionText: Long press a message to delete

insight.title: How did you know long press would delete?
insight.subtitle: Context menus are the door to hidden features
insight.longPressDesc: UIs that do not respond to a tap often show additional menus on long press.
insight.contextMenuDesc: The menu appearing on long press lists what you can do with this item.
insight.destructiveDesc: Delete buttons are red to warn about irreversible actions.

insight.title: How did you understand the group creation steps?
insight.subtitle: Wizard UI naturally guides through the process
insight.plusDesc: The plus icon is a universal symbol meaning add or create.
insight.wizardTitle: Step format breaks down complex operations
insight.wizardDesc: The flow breaks complex actions into small steps teaching what to do next.
insight.checkboxDesc: Checkboxes with check marks intuitively indicate selection state.
